languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

languages.text: "Благодарю, генетор Фебрус. Я больше волнуюсь о вас — на части было разделено не только ваше тело, но и цвета... Они иные, словно что-то надломилось и никак не соберется вновь".

"Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю, генетор Фебрус. Я больше волнуюсь о вас — на части было разделено не только ваше тело, но и цвета... Они иные, словно что-то надломилось и никак не соберется вновь".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

"Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

"Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

languages.text: «Gracias, genetor Februs. Estoy más preocupada por usted: no solo han descuartizado su cuerpo, sino que sus colores... son diferentes, como si algo se hubiera roto irremediablemente».
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias, genetor Februs. Estoy más preocupada por usted: no solo han descuartizado su cuerpo, sino que sus colores... son diferentes, como si algo se hubiera roto irremediablemente».

languages.text: 「ありがとうございます、ゲネター・フェブラス。あたくしはむしろあなたのことが心配ですの――お体が切り刻まれただけでなく、あなたの色彩が……以前とは違うのです。まるで何かが砕け散って、二度と元には戻せないかのように」
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

traits.locale_text: 「ありがとうございます、ゲネター・フェブラス。あたくしはむしろあなたのことが心配ですの――お体が切り刻まれただけでなく、あなたの色彩が……以前とは違うのです。まるで何かが砕け散って、二度と元には戻せないかのように」

languages.text: “谢谢你，基因士费布鲁斯。我更担心你。你不仅身体被撕扯得支离破碎，就连你的色彩也……发生了异变。仿佛有什么东西碎裂，再也无法拼凑完整。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

traits.locale_text: “谢谢你，基因士费布鲁斯。我更担心你。你不仅身体被撕扯得支离破碎，就连你的色彩也……发生了异变。仿佛有什么东西碎裂，再也无法拼凑完整。”

languages.text: "Danke, Genetor Februs. Ich mache mir mehr Sorgen um Euch – es wurde nicht nur Euer Körper in Stücke gerissen, auch Eure Farben ... sie sind anders, als wäre etwas zerbrochen, das nie mehr zusammengesetzt werden kann."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

traits.locale_text: "Danke, Genetor Februs. Ich mache mir mehr Sorgen um Euch – es wurde nicht nur Euer Körper in Stücke gerissen, auch Eure Farben ... sie sind anders, als wäre etwas zerbrochen, das nie mehr zusammengesetzt werden kann."

languages.text: « Merci, genetor Februs. Je me fais plutôt du souci pour vous. Non seulement votre corps a été mis en pièces, mais vos couleurs... Elles ont changé, comme si quelque chose avait été irrémédiablement brisé. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

traits.locale_text: « Merci, genetor Februs. Je me fais plutôt du souci pour vous. Non seulement votre corps a été mis en pièces, mais vos couleurs... Elles ont changé, comme si quelque chose avait été irrémédiablement brisé. »

languages.text: "Teşekkür ederim Genetör Februs. Senin için daha çok endişeleniyorum. Sadece bedenin parçalanmakla kalmadı, renklerin de... Farklılar, sanki bir şey parçalanmış ve bir daha asla bir araya getirilemezmiş gibi."
languages.original_text: "Thank you, Genetor Februs. I am more concerned about you — not only has your body been torn to pieces, but your colours... they are different, as if something has shattered and can never be put back together."

traits.locale_text: "Teşekkür ederim Genetör Februs. Senin için daha çok endişeleniyorum. Sadece bedenin parçalanmakla kalmadı, renklerin de... Farklılar, sanki bir şey parçalanmış ve bir daha asla bir araya getirilemezmiş gibi."
